description: Result emitted by gc pack outdated --json.

schema_version.description: Version of this JSON result shape.

refreshed.description: Whether registry catalogs were refreshed before checking.

name.description: Binding or display name for the dependency.

latest_allowed.description: Newest version allowed by the declared constraint.

latest_available.description: Newest version available regardless of the declared constraint.

origin.description: Where the dependency came from, such as source, path, or registry:name.

withdrawn.description: Whether the current locked registry release is withdrawn.
